description_long: This object is a steampunk-inspired airship featuring a large, dark brown, cigar-shaped gas envelope with visible seam lines and metallic end caps. Suspended beneath the envelope is a mechanical gondola with exposed framework, propellers, and fins, giving it a retro-futuristic appearance. The gondola includes a visible cockpit area, a central propeller at the front, and two side-mounted stabilizing fins, one of which is painted red. The tail section of the airship features two large, black vertical stabilizers and a smaller horizontal stabilizer. The materials appear to be a combination of fabric or leather for the envelope, metal for the framework and propellers, and glass for the cockpit. The overall design suggests a lightweight, buoyant structure intended for flight above urban environments.
description: A steampunk-style airship with a brown, cigar-shaped envelope, exposed metal gondola, and prominent propellers and fins.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated brown envelope, suspended gondola with propellers, and two large black stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, central front propeller, and symmetrical placement of the stabilizing fins and gondola.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the red stabilizing fin more visible and the gondola's structure clearly shown.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin black vertical stabilizers, the tail end of the envelope, and the rear propeller arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No traditional wings; features twin large vertical stabilizers and a small horizontal stabilizer at the tail, with side-mounted stabilizing fins on the gondola.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted propeller engine with additional small propellers on the gondola.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail with a small central horizontal stabilizer, conventional configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; gondola is suspended beneath the envelope.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit integrated into the gondola beneath the main envelope.
